title.zh-TW: 新增 MEMTRACE_TOKEN 環境變數

body.zh-TW: 為支援 `list_workspaces` 及未來寫入工具存取 `/api/v1/workspaces`，新增 `MEMTRACE_TOKEN` 環境變數。此變數將 API token 注入 `apiFetch` 的 `Authorization: Bearer` 標頭中。
body.en: The `MEMTRACE_TOKEN` environment variable is added to support `list_workspaces` and future writing tools in accessing `/api/v1/workspaces`. This variable injects the API token into the `Authorization: Bearer` header of `apiFetch`.
